coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/1. 28:30 at threshold. Get comfortable being uncomfortable.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First threshold block. 95-105% FTP. Settle in — don't overcook the start.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Starting threshold work. This is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting: 105% for 28:30. Settle in. You can hold this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 50% done. 1 intervals left. 27 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-100 rpm, 55-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 9:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/3. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/3. 55% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is harder than the last one. That's the point. Rep 3/3.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 18:45 at 130%. Then 9min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep! 18:45 at 130%. Leave nothing in reserve. You'll be cooling down in 9 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Same power as last time, but you're way more tired. Progressive overload! *cries in watts*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 130% × 18:45. Then 9min cooldown. Leave nothing.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 87% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 87% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 87% into session. 55%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.
